name: Neon Abyss
description: Neon Abyss is a visionary comic book publisher dedicated to exploring the darker corners of the human experience through gritty tech-noir narratives. Our titles embrace avant-garde artistic styles, merging stunning visuals with complex storytelling that often delves into adult themes. We aim to challenge conventions and provoke thought, drawing readers into a world where technology and humanity clash in morally ambiguous landscapes.
logo: The logo for Neon Abyss features the word "Abyss" illuminated in vibrant neon colors against a stark, dark background. The neon tubes are designed to appear slightly aged and worn, with hints of flickering light that suggest a failing illumination. Some tubes glow brightly in shades of electric blue and deep violet, while others emit a dimmer, more muted glow, creating a sense of unevenness. The overall effect is one of haunting beauty, evoking a sense of intrigue and decay that reflects the publisher's commitment to gritty, tech-noir themes.
